---
title: "Find A Gene Project PT 2"
author: "May Alsoufi (PID: A17423250)"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)
```

```{r}
aln <- read.fasta("rbp4_sequences.fasta.txt")
```

```{r}
id <- seqidentity(aln)
```

```{r}
heatmap(id,
        col=colorRampPalette(c("white","orange","red"))(100),
        margins=c(15,15))
```

```{r}
hits <- blast.pdb(aln$ali["Human_RBP4",])
```

```{r}
hits
```

```{r}
head(hits)
```

```{r}
names(hits)
```

```{r}
```


```{r}
hits$hit.tbl
```

```{r}
ids <- substr(hits$hit.tbl$subjectids[1:3], 1, 4)
ids
```

```{r}
anno <- pdb.annotate(ids)
anno
```
```{r}
anno$experimentalTechnique
anno$resolution
anno$source
```

```{r}
hits$hit.tbl$identity[1:3]
hits$hit.tbl$evalue[1:3]
```
